title: A Kangaroo Named Hunter Escaped in Kentucky. It Took 3 Agencies.
script: A red kangaroo named Hunter escaped his owner's property in Richmond, Kentucky — and it took 3 agencies to find him. Police, Kentucky Fish and Wildlife, and Animal Control all scrambled after Hunter was spotted hopping through a residential neighborhood. The Australian marsupial was eventually cornered and returned to his owner Thursday. It's unclear how Hunter escaped. Kentucky is now on the short list of states that have lost a kangaroo.
